<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use App\Models\Setting;
use App\Models\Project;
use App\Models\Skill;
use App\Models\Testimonial;
use App\Models\Category;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;

class PortfolioController extends Controller
{
    public function index()
    {
        $settings = Setting::allSettings();

        $projects = Project::orderBy('sort_order')->orderBy('created_at', 'desc')->get();
        $categories = Category::orderBy('sort_order')->get();
        $skills = Skill::orderBy('sort_order')->get()->groupBy('category');
        $testimonials = Testimonial::active()->get();

        $typingWords = json_decode($settings['typing_words'] ?? '["Full-Stack Developer"]', true);

        $calcSettings = [
            'base_landing' => $settings['calc_base_landing'] ?? 50000,
            'base_business' => $settings['calc_base_business'] ?? 80000,
            'base_school' => $settings['calc_base_school'] ?? 150000,
            'base_ecommerce' => $settings['calc_base_ecommerce'] ?? 200000,
            'base_webapp' => $settings['calc_base_webapp'] ?? 300000,
            'per_page' => $settings['calc_per_page'] ?? 10000,
            'included_pages' => $settings['calc_included_pages'] ?? 5,
            'feat_seo' => $settings['calc_feat_seo'] ?? 20000,
            'feat_payment' => $settings['calc_feat_payment'] ?? 30000,
            'feat_auth' => $settings['calc_feat_auth'] ?? 25000,
            'feat_dashboard' => $settings['calc_feat_dashboard'] ?? 40000,
            'feat_api' => $settings['calc_feat_api'] ?? 35000,
            'feat_chat' => $settings['calc_feat_chat'] ?? 15000,
            'feat_cms' => $settings['calc_feat_cms'] ?? 35000,
            'feat_email' => $settings['calc_feat_email'] ?? 15000,
        ];

        return view('portfolio.index', compact(
            'settings',
            'projects',
            'categories',
            'skills',
            'testimonials',
            'typingWords',
            'calcSettings'
        ));
    }

    public function downloadCV()
    {
        $cvPath = Setting::get('cv_path');

        if ($cvPath && file_exists(storage_path('app/public/' . $cvPath))) {
            return response()->download(storage_path('app/public/' . $cvPath));
        }

        return back()->with('error', 'CV not available. Please upload it from the admin dashboard.');
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use App\Models\Setting;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;

class SettingController extends Controller
{
    public function edit()
    {
        $settings = Setting::allSettings();
        return view('admin.settings.edit', compact('settings'));
    }

    public function update(Request $request)
    {
        $validated = $request->validate([
            'site_name' => ['required', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'hero_title' => ['required', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'hero_subtitle' => ['required', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'typing_words' => ['required', 'string'],
            'about_bio' => ['required', 'string'],
            'current_role' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'location' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'email' => ['required', 'email'],
            'phone' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'whatsapp' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'github_url' => ['nullable', 'url'],
            'linkedin_url' => ['nullable', 'url'],
            'hero_avatar' => ['nullable', 'image', 'max:2048'],
            'cv_path' => ['nullable', 'file', 'max:5120', 'mimes:pdf,doc,docx'],
            'stat_projects' => ['nullable', 'integer'],
            'stat_clients' => ['nullable', 'integer'],
            'stat_experience' => ['nullable', 'integer'],
            'stat_technologies' => ['nullable', 'integer'],
            'calc_base_landing' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:0'],
            'calc_base_business' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:0'],
            'calc_base_school' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:0'],
            'calc_base_ecommerce' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:0'],
            'calc_base_webapp' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:0'],
            'calc_per_page' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:0'],
            'calc_included_pages' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:0'],
            'calc_feat_seo' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:0'],
            'calc_feat_payment' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:0'],
            'calc_feat_auth' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:0'],
            'calc_feat_dashboard' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:0'],
            'calc_feat_api' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:0'],
            'calc_feat_chat' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:0'],
            'calc_feat_cms' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:0'],
            'calc_feat_email' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:0'],
        ]);

        // Process typing words into JSON
        $words = array_filter(array_map('trim', explode(',', $validated['typing_words'])));
        Setting::set('typing_words', json_encode($words));

        // Save text settings
        $textKeys = [
            'site_name', 'hero_title', 'hero_subtitle', 'about_bio',
            'current_role', 'location', 'email', 'phone', 'whatsapp',
            'github_url', 'linkedin_url',
            'stat_projects', 'stat_clients', 'stat_experience', 'stat_technologies',
            'calc_base_landing', 'calc_base_business', 'calc_base_school',
            'calc_base_ecommerce', 'calc_base_webapp',
            'calc_per_page', 'calc_included_pages',
            'calc_feat_seo', 'calc_feat_payment', 'calc_feat_auth',
            'calc_feat_dashboard', 'calc_feat_api', 'calc_feat_chat',
            'calc_feat_cms', 'calc_feat_email',
        ];

        foreach ($textKeys as $key) {
            Setting::set($key, $validated[$key] ?? null);
        }

        // Handle avatar upload
        if ($request->hasFile('hero_avatar')) {
            Setting::set('hero_avatar', $request->file('hero_avatar')->store('avatars', 'public'));
        }

        // Handle CV upload
        if ($request->hasFile('cv_path')) {
            Setting::set('cv_path', $request->file('cv_path')->store('cv', 'public'));
        }

        return redirect()->route('admin.settings.edit')->with('success', 'Settings updated successfully.');
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Auth;

class AdminAuthController extends Controller
{
    public function showLogin()
    {
        if (Auth::check()) {
            return redirect()->route('admin.dashboard');
        }

        return view('admin.login');
    }

    public function login(Request $request)
    {
        $credentials = $request->validate([
            'email' => ['required', 'email'],
            'password' => ['required'],
        ]);

        if (Auth::attempt($credentials, $request->boolean('remember'))) {
            if (! Auth::user()->is_admin) {
                Auth::logout();
                $request->session()->invalidate();
                $request->session()->regenerateToken();
                return back()->withErrors([
                    'email' => 'You do not have admin access.',
                ])->onlyInput('email');
            }

            $request->session()->regenerate();
            return redirect()->intended(route('admin.dashboard'));
        }

        return back()->withErrors([
            'email' => 'The provided credentials do not match our records.',
        ])->onlyInput('email');
    }

    public function logout(Request $request)
    {
        Auth::logout();
        $request->session()->invalidate();
        $request->session()->regenerateToken();
        return redirect()->route('admin.login');
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use App\Models\Project;
use App\Models\Category;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Str;

class ProjectController extends Controller
{
    public function index()
    {
        $projects = Project::with('category')->orderBy('sort_order')->latest()->paginate(10);
        return view('admin.projects.index', compact('projects'));
    }

    public function create()
    {
        $categories = Category::orderBy('name')->get();
        return view('admin.projects.create', compact('categories'));
    }

    public function store(Request $request)
    {
        if ($request->input('project_url') === '#') {
            $request->merge(['project_url' => null]);
        }

        $validated = $request->validate([
            'title' => ['required', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'category_id' => ['required', 'exists:categories,id'],
            'description' => ['required', 'string'],
            'image_path' => ['nullable', 'image', 'max:2048'],
            'project_url' => ['nullable', 'url'],
            'is_featured' => ['boolean'],
            'sort_order' => ['nullable', 'integer'],
        ]);

        if ($request->hasFile('image_path')) {
            $validated['image_path'] = $request->file('image_path')->store('projects', 'public');
        }

        $validated['slug'] = Str::slug($validated['title']);
        $validated['is_featured'] = $request->boolean('is_featured');
        $validated['sort_order'] = $validated['sort_order'] ?? 0;

        Project::create($validated);

        return redirect()->route('admin.projects.index')->with('success', 'Project created successfully.');
    }

    public function edit(Project $project)
    {
        $categories = Category::orderBy('name')->get();
        return view('admin.projects.edit', compact('project', 'categories'));
    }

    public function update(Request $request, Project $project)
    {
        if ($request->input('project_url') === '#') {
            $request->merge(['project_url' => null]);
        }

        $validated = $request->validate([
            'title' => ['required', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'category_id' => ['required', 'exists:categories,id'],
            'description' => ['required', 'string'],
            'image_path' => ['nullable', 'image', 'max:2048'],
            'project_url' => ['nullable', 'url'],
            'is_featured' => ['boolean'],
            'sort_order' => ['nullable', 'integer'],
        ]);

        if ($request->hasFile('image_path')) {
            $validated['image_path'] = $request->file('image_path')->store('projects', 'public');
        }

        $validated['slug'] = Str::slug($validated['title']);
        $validated['is_featured'] = $request->boolean('is_featured');
        $validated['sort_order'] = $validated['sort_order'] ?? 0;

        $project->update($validated);

        return redirect()->route('admin.projects.index')->with('success', 'Project updated successfully.');
    }

    public function destroy(Project $project)
    {
        $project->delete();
        return redirect()->route('admin.projects.index')->with('success', 'Project deleted successfully.');
    }
}

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use App\Models\ContactMessage;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;

class ContactMessageController extends Controller
{
    public function index(Request $request)
    {
        $query = ContactMessage::latest();

        if ($request->has('filter') && $request->filter === 'unread') {
            $query->unread();
        }

        $messages = $query->paginate(10);
        return view('admin.messages.index', compact('messages'));
    }

    public function show(ContactMessage $message)
    {
        if (!$message->is_read) {
            $message->update(['is_read' => true]);
        }

        return view('admin.messages.show', compact('message'));
    }

    public function markRead(ContactMessage $message)
    {
        $message->update(['is_read' => true]);
        return back()->with('success', 'Message marked as read.');
    }

    public function destroy(ContactMessage $message)
    {
        $message->delete();
        return redirect()->route('admin.messages.index')->with('success', 'Message deleted successfully.');
    }
}

            'icon_class' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'sort_order' => ['nullable', 'integer'],
        ]);

        $validated['sort_order'] = $validated['sort_order'] ?? 0;

        $skill->update($validated);

        return redirect()->route('admin.skills.index')->with('success', 'Skill updated successfully.');
    }

    public function destroy(Skill $skill)
    {
        $skill->delete();
        return redirect()->route('admin.skills.index')->with('success', 'Skill deleted successfully.');
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use App\Models\Testimonial;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;

class TestimonialController extends Controller
{
    public function index()
    {
        $testimonials = Testimonial::orderBy('sort_order')->latest()->paginate(10);
        return view('admin.testimonials.index', compact('testimonials'));
    }

    public function create()
    {
        return view('admin.testimonials.create');
    }

    public function store(Request $request)
    {
        $validated = $request->validate([
            'author_name' => ['required', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'author_role' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'author_company' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'content' => ['required', 'string'],
            'avatar_path' => ['nullable', 'image', 'max:2048'],
            'rating' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:1', 'max:5'],
            'is_active' => ['boolean'],
            'sort_order' => ['nullable', 'integer'],
        ]);

        if ($request->hasFile('avatar_path')) {
            $validated['avatar_path'] = $request->file('avatar_path')->store('avatars', 'public');
        }

        $validated['is_active'] = $request->boolean('is_active');
        $validated['sort_order'] = $validated['sort_order'] ?? 0;

        Testimonial::create($validated);

        return redirect()->route('admin.testimonials.index')->with('success', 'Testimonial created successfully.');
    }

    public function edit(Testimonial $testimonial)
    {
        return view('admin.testimonials.edit', compact('testimonial'));
    }

    public function update(Request $request, Testimonial $testimonial)
    {
        $validated = $request->validate([
            'author_name' => ['required', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'author_role' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'author_company' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'content' => ['required', 'string'],
            'avatar_path' => ['nullable', 'image', 'max:2048'],
            'rating' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:1', 'max:5'],
            'is_active' => ['boolean'],
            'sort_order' => ['nullable', 'integer'],
        ]);

        if ($request->hasFile('avatar_path')) {
            $validated['avatar_path'] = $request->file('avatar_path')->store('avatars', 'public');
        }

        $validated['is_active'] = $request->boolean('is_active');
        $validated['sort_order'] = $validated['sort_order'] ?? 0;

        $testimonial->update($validated);

        return redirect()->route('admin.testimonials.index')->with('success', 'Testimonial updated successfully.');
    }

    public function destroy(Testimonial $testimonial)
    {
        $testimonial->delete();
        return redirect()->route('admin.testimonials.index')->with('success', 'Testimonial deleted successfully.');
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Http\Middleware;

use Closure;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;

class IsAdmin
{
    /**
     * Handle an incoming request.
     *
     * @param  Closure(Request): (Response)  $next
     */
    public function handle(Request $request, Closure $next): Response
    {
        if (! $request->user() || ! $request->user()->is_admin) {
            abort(403, 'Unauthorized access to admin panel.');
        }

        return $next($request);
    }
}

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Support\Str;

class Category extends Model
{
    protected $fillable = ['name', 'slug', 'icon', 'sort_order'];

    protected static function boot(): void
    {
        parent::boot();

        static::creating(function ($category) {
            if (empty($category->slug)) {
                $category->slug = Str::slug($category->name);
            }
        });
    }

    public function projects()
    {
        return $this->hasMany(Project::class, 'category_id', 'id');
    }
}

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Support\Str;

class Project extends Model
{
    protected $fillable = [
        'title',
        'slug',
        'category_id',
        'description',
        'image_path',
        'gallery',
        'project_url',
        'is_featured',
        'sort_order',
    ];

    protected $casts = [
        'gallery' => 'array',
        'is_featured' => 'boolean',
    ];

    protected static function boot(): void
    {
        parent::boot();

        static::creating(function ($project) {
            if (empty($project->slug)) {
                $project->slug = Str::slug($project->title);
            }
        });
    }

    public function category()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(Category::class);
    }

    public function scopeFeatured($query)
    {
        return $query->where('is_featured', true);
    }

    public function getThumbnailUrlAttribute()
    {
        return $this->image_path
            ? asset('storage/' . $this->image_path)
            : asset('images/project-placeholder.svg');
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Cache;

class Setting extends Model
{
    protected $fillable = ['key', 'value'];

    protected static function boot(): void
    {
        parent::boot();

        static::saved(function () {
            Cache::forget('app_settings');
        });

        static::deleted(function () {
            Cache::forget('app_settings');
        });
    }

    public static function get(string $key, $default = null)
    {
        $settings = self::all();

        $setting = $settings->firstWhere('key', $key);

        return $setting?->value ?? $default;
    }

    public static function set(string $key, $value): void
    {
        self::updateOrCreate(
            ['key' => $key],
            ['value' => $value]
        );
    }

    public static function allSettings(): array
    {
        return Cache::rememberForever('app_settings', function () {
            return self::pluck('value', 'key')->toArray();
        });
    }
}

FROM php:8.2-fpm-alpine

# Install system deps, PHP extensions, and cleanup build deps in one layer
RUN apk add --no-cache \
    nginx \
    postgresql-dev \
    libpng-dev \
    libzip-dev \
    oniguruma-dev \
    zip \
    unzip \
    nodejs \
    npm \
    && docker-php-ext-install pdo_pgsql mbstring exif pcntl bcmath gd zip

# Get Composer
COPY --from=composer:latest /usr/bin/composer /usr/bin/composer

WORKDIR /var/www/html

# Install PHP deps
COPY composer.json composer.lock ./
RUN composer install --no-dev --optimize-autoloader --no-interaction --no-scripts

# Install Node deps and build assets in one layer
COPY package.json package-lock.json ./
COPY . .
RUN npm ci && npm run build && npm prune --production

# Run artisan discovery now that source is copied
RUN composer dump-autoload --optimize && php artisan package:discover --ansi

# Set permissions
RUN chown -R www-data:www-data /var/www/html && chmod -R 775 storage bootstrap/cache

# Configure nginx and entrypoint
COPY docker/nginx.conf /etc/nginx/http.d/default.conf
COPY docker/entrypoint.sh /usr/local/bin/entrypoint.sh
RUN chmod +x /usr/local/bin/entrypoint.sh

EXPOSE 80

ENTRYPOINT ["/usr/local/bin/entrypoint.sh"]

#!/bin/sh
set -e

# Ensure APP_KEY is in Laravel's base64: format
case "$APP_KEY" in
    base64:*) ;;
    *)
        NEW_KEY="base64:$(php -r 'echo base64_encode(random_bytes(32));')"
        if [ -f .env ]; then
            sed -i "s|^APP_KEY=.*|APP_KEY=${NEW_KEY}|" .env
        else
            echo "APP_KEY=${NEW_KEY}" > .env
        fi
        export APP_KEY="$NEW_KEY"
        ;;
esac

# Fix APP_URL to include protocol if missing
case "$APP_URL" in
    http://*|https://*) ;;
    *)
        if [ -n "$APP_URL" ]; then
            FIXED_URL="https://${APP_URL}"
            if [ -f .env ]; then
                sed -i "s|^APP_URL=.*|APP_URL=${FIXED_URL}|" .env
            fi
            export APP_URL="$FIXED_URL"
        fi
        ;;
esac

# Start PHP-FPM in background
php-fpm -D

# Run migrations
php artisan migrate --force

# Only seed if database is empty (first deploy)
USER_COUNT=$(php artisan tinker --execute='echo \App\Models\User::count();' 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
if [ "$USER_COUNT" = "0" ]; then
    php artisan db:seed --force
fi

# Ensure the admin user has is_admin = true (survives redeploys with existing DB)
php artisan tinker --execute='App\Models\User::where("is_admin", false)->orWhereNull("is_admin")->update(["is_admin" => true]);' 2>/dev/null || true

# Create storage symlink
php artisan storage:link 2>/dev/null || true

# Clear and cache config
php artisan config:cache
php artisan route:cache
php artisan view:cache

# Start nginx in foreground
nginx -g 'daemon off;'

parts.text:
<think>I found a CRITICAL security issue in the entrypoint.sh! Line:
```
php artisan tinker --execute='App\Models\User::where("is_admin", false)->orWhereNull("is_admin")->update(["is_admin" => true]);' 2>/dev/null || true
```

This sets ALL users to is_admin = true on every deploy! This is a massive privilege escalation vulnerability - any registered user becomes an admin.

Also, the seeder runs if database is empty - let me note that. And the entrypoint runs migrations on every startup which could be risky.

Also notable:
- `projects.category_id` is `string` not a foreignId/unsignedBigInteger - no foreign key constraint. And the Project model has `belongsTo(Category::class)` but category_id is a string column. This is a bug.
- No rate limiting on login or contact form
- No security headers middleware
- Dockerfile runs as root (no USER directive) - nginx and php-fpm
- SESSION_ENCRYPT=false
- APP_DEBUG=true in .env.example (but render.yaml sets false, so OK for prod)
- DB_PASSWORD empty in .env.example (default credentials)
- No CSRF protection issue - Laravel handles it. But the contact form is a POST returning JSON - that's fine with CSRF.
- File uploads: 'image' validation but stored on public disk with original-ish names (store() generates random names, so OK). No MIME sniffing concerns beyond that.
- No {!! !!} usage - good, XSS via blade is mitigated.
- N+1 queries: PortfolioController index() - `Setting::allSettings()` is cached. But `Project::orderBy(...)->get()` without eager loading category. In the blade it might access project->category causing N+1. Let me note that. Actually ProjectController admin index uses `with('category')` but PortfolioController doesn't.
- DashboardController: 4 separate count queries + 2 latest queries = 6 queries, fine.
- No caching of portfolio queries except settings.
- Category_id is string type but should be foreign id - data integrity issue.

Let me check the seeder to see default admin credentials - this could be a critical issue (default credentials). Let me quickly check the seeders.

I have limited budget. Let me check the seeder quickly and the portfolio blade for eager loading usage and image loading. Actually, let me prioritize. The seeder is important for default credentials. Let me read it.

Let me also verify there's no CORS config (there's no config/cors.php in the list - meaning default CORS, which for a web-only app is fine, but worth noting no sanctum either).

Let me do a final batch: read seeder, check portfolio blade for image loading and project->category access.</think>Found a **critical** issue in entrypoint.sh. Let me check the seeder (default credentials) and the portfolio blade (N+1 / image loading) as final targeted reads.

parts.text:
<think>I now have all the evidence I need. Let me compile the comprehensive audit report.

Key findings:

**CRITICAL:**
1. entrypoint.sh: `php artisan tinker --execute='App\Models\User::where("is_admin", false)->orWhereNull("is_admin")->update(["is_admin" => true]);'` — sets ALL users to admin on every deploy! Massive privilege escalation.
2. DatabaseSeeder.php: hardcoded default admin credentials `admin@abideen.dev` / `password` — weak, guessable, seeded into production. Combined with the entrypoint making all users admin.
3. .env.example: `DB_PASSWORD=` empty, `APP_DEBUG=true`, `APP_KEY=` empty. Default MySQL root with no password.

**HIGH:**
4. No rate limiting anywhere — login (`/admin/login`) brute-forceable, contact form (`/contact`) spam/abuseable. No `throttle:` middleware on any route.
5. No security headers — no middleware adding X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Content-Security-Policy, Strict-Transport-Security, Referrer-Policy. bootstrap/app.php doesn't append any. No CORS config file exists.
6. Dockerfile runs as root — no `USER` directive; php-fpm and nginx run as root. Exposes port 80 directly (no TLS termination in container; relies on Render proxy).
7. `projects.category_id` declared as `string` not `foreignId`/`unsignedBigInteger`, and no foreign key constraint (migration 2026_07_09_214802 line ~16). Data integrity issue + orphaned projects possible. Note: seeder passes integer IDs into a string column.
8. File uploads stored on `public` local disk with no MIME validation beyond Laravel's `image`/`mimes` rule (which checks extension/mime). Acceptable but uploads go to ephemeral local disk on Render free tier → lost on redeploy. No path traversal risk (store() generates names). Old avatars/CV/images not deleted on update (orphaned files).

**MEDIUM:**
9. Session encryption off (`SESSION_ENCRYPT=false` in .env.example). Session cookie secure flag not enforced (SESSION_SECURE_COOKIE not set). On Render behind proxy — `trustProxies(at: '*')` is set which is broad but acceptable.
10. N+1 query: PortfolioController::index() loads `Project::orderBy(...)->get()` without eager loading `category`, and the blade (portfolio/index.blade.php:426) accesses `$project->category->name` inside a loop → N+1. Admin ProjectController uses `with('category')` but public one doesn't.
11. No caching of portfolio queries (only `Setting::allSettings()` is cached). Projects/categories/skills/testimonials re-queried on every homepage load. Under load the homepage hits DB hard.
12. No queue workers — `QUEUE_CONNECTION=database` but no worker process defined in render.yaml or entrypoint. Contact messages saved synchronously (fine since no email), but if email notifications added they'd block. No failed job handling config issue but no jobs dispatched at all.
13. Dashboard runs 6 separate queries (4 counts + 2 latest) — minor, acceptable.
14. Migrations missing indexes: `contact_messages` has no index on `is_read` or `email` or `created_at` (though `latest()` uses created_at; fine for small data). `projects` no index on `category_id`, `is_featured`, `sort_order`. `skills` no index on `category`. `testimonials` no index on `is_active`. Will degrade as data grows.

**LOW:**
15. Images in portfolio blade (lines 401, 468) lack `loading="lazy"` — all project/testimonial images load eagerly on homepage. Impacts LCP/perceived performance under load.
16. `client_max_body_size 20M` in nginx but no matching `upload_max_filesize`/`post_max_size` PHP ini config in Dockerfile — uploads >2MB (PHP default) may fail silently despite validation `max:5120`. The `image|max:2048` and `file|max:5120` rules assume PHP can accept that size.
17. `php artisan migrate --force` runs on every container start in entrypoint — risky in multi-instance deploys (concurrent migrations), though Render free is single instance.
18. `config:cache` runs but `APP_KEY` is auto-generated and persisted to .env via sed only if .env exists — on Render env vars come from dashboard, .env may not exist, so APP_KEY regenerates on every deploy invalidating sessions. render.yaml sets `APP_KEY: sync: false` (good — means set in dashboard), but entrypoint logic could override.
19. `ContactMessage` has no length cap on `message` (only `min:10`) — could store huge messages (DoS via DB). `subject` nullable string max:255 OK.
20. No CSRF concerns — Laravel default VerifyCsrfToken is on for web routes; contact POST is covered. Good.
21. No `{!! !!}` / `v-html` usage anywhere — XSS via blade is mitigated. Good.
22. Mass assignment: all models use `$fillable`. User includes `is_admin` in fillable — combined with entrypoint bug this is concerning, but no controller mass-assigns is_admin from user input, so OK on its own. Still, `is_admin` in fillable is a mild risk if any `User::create/update` with request data exists. None found.
23. No Sanctum/API routes — fine for this app. No `config/cors.php` present (default deny cross-origin, acceptable).
24. `FILESYSTEM_DISK=local` in render.yaml — uploaded files stored on ephemeral disk; lost on redeploy and not shared. Should use S3 for persistence.

Let me write this up clearly. I have enough. Let me complete.</think>I now have comprehensive evidence across all requested areas. Compiling the final audit report.

args.result:
# Security & Scalability Audit — Laravel Portfolio (`C:\Users\hp\Desktop\portt`)

I read every controller, route, middleware, model, migration, config file, the Dockerfile, `render.yaml`, `entrypoint.sh`, `nginx.conf`, the seeder, and searched all blade templates for XSS patterns. Findings below with exact paths/line numbers and severity.

---

## 🔴 CRITICAL

**C1. Every user is force-promoted to admin on each deploy**
- `docker/entrypoint.sh` (near end):
  `php artisan tinker --execute='App\Models\User::where("is_admin", false)->orWhereNull("is_admin")->update(["is_admin" => true]);' 2>/dev/null || true`
- This runs on every container start. ANY registered user becomes `is_admin = true`, bypassing `IsAdmin` middleware entirely. Combined with the seeded admin below, this is a full privilege-escalation backdoor.
- **Fix:** Remove this line entirely. Manage admin status deliberately.

**C2. Hardcoded default admin credentials in production seeder**
- `database/seeders/DatabaseSeeder.php:17-23`: `email => 'admin@abideen.dev'`, `password => bcrypt('password')`.
- `entrypoint.sh` runs `php artisan db:seed --force` whenever `User::count() == 0`. On a fresh/wiped DB the app boots with a publicly-guessable admin login (`password`).
- **Fix:** Seed via env vars (`password' => bcrypt(env('ADMIN_PASSWORD'))`) with a strong random default, or disable seeding in production.

**C3. Weak/default secrets in `.env.example`**
- `.env.example`: `APP_KEY=` (empty), `APP_DEBUG=true`, `DB_PASSWORD=` (empty), `DB_USERNAME=root`, `DB_DATABASE=portt_dr`.
- `config/app.php:65` `'key' => env('APP_KEY')` with no fallback. If deployed without a key, the entrypoint auto-generates one **on every boot** (when no `.env` exists) — invalidating all sessions/encrypted data each deploy.
- `render.yaml` does set `APP_DEBUG=false` and `APP_KEY: sync:false` (good), but the `.env.example` template encourages insecure defaults.
- **Fix:** Set `APP_DEBUG=false` default, document mandatory `APP_KEY`, never commit real keys.

---

## 🟠 HIGH

**H1. No rate limiting on any route (brute-force / spam)**
- Searched all of `routes/web.php` and the whole repo for `throttle|RateLimiter` — zero matches (only an unrelated comment in `config/auth.php:89`).
- `routes/web.php:21` `Route::post('/admin/login', ...)` — login is brute-forceable.
- `routes/web.php:19` `Route::post('/contact', ...)` — contact form is spam/abuse-abuseable; `ContactController::store` (`app/Http/Controllers/ContactController.php:13`) writes straight to DB with no throttle and no captcha.
- **Fix:** Add `->middleware('throttle:5,1')` to login and `throttle:10,1'` to contact; consider `throttle:60,1` on the global web group.

**H2. Missing security headers**
- `bootstrap/app.php:16-24` registers only `trustProxies(at: '*')` and the `admin` alias. No headers middleware. No `config/cors.php` exists. No package (e.g. `kitloong/laravel-security-headers`) installed.
- Missing: `X-Frame-Options`, `X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff`, `Content-Security-Policy`, `Strict-Transport-Security`, `Referrer-Policy`, `Permissions-Policy`.
- **Fix:** Add a middleware that sets these headers; register via `$middleware->append(...)` or in a global group.

**H3. Dockerfile runs as root / no user isolation**
- `Dockerfile`: no `USER` directive. `php-fpm` and `nginx` start as root (`entrypoint.sh` → `php-fpm -D` + `nginx -g 'daemon off;'`). `chown -R www-data` is set but processes still launch as root. Exposes port 80 directly inside the container (TLS terminated by Render proxy — acceptable, but root process is not).
- **Fix:** Add a non-root `USER` after permissions setup, or run nginx/php-fpm as `www-data`. Consider a multi-stage build; don't ship `nodejs`/`npm` in the runtime image (currently installed for build only but remain in the final image — larger attack surface).

**H4. Broken `category_id` type + no foreign key**
- `database/migrations/2026_07_09_214802_create_projects_table.php:16`: `$table->string('category_id');` — should be `$table->foreignId('category_id')->constrained()->cascadeOnDelete();`.
- `app/Models/Project.php` declares `belongsTo(Category::class)` and `ProjectController` validates `exists:categories,id`, but the column is a `string` and the seeder passes integer IDs. No DB-level FK → orphaned projects possible, and `JOIN`/indexing is suboptimal on a string column.
- **Fix:** Migration to convert `category_id` to `unsignedBigInteger` + foreign key.

**H5. Ephemeral local storage for user uploads (data loss / multi-instance breakage)**
- `render.yaml` sets `FILESYSTEM_DISK: local`; `config/filesystems.php` `public` disk → `storage_path('app/public')`. All uploads (`SettingController` avatar/CV, `ProjectController`/`TestimonialController` images) via `->store(..., 'public')` land on the container's ephemeral disk.
- On Render free tier, disk is wiped on every redeploy → uploaded avatars, CV, project images, testimonial avatars disappear. Also not shared across instances.
- Additionally, **old files are never deleted** on update (e.g. `SettingController::update` lines ~88-93, `ProjectController` ~46, `TestimonialController` ~28) → orphaned files accumulate.
- **Fix:** Use S3 disk (`AWS_*` vars exist in `.env.example`); delete previous file on replacement.

---

## 🟡 MEDIUM

**M1. N+1 query on the homepage**
- `app/Http/Controllers/PortfolioController.php:17`: `Project::orderBy('sort_order')->orderBy('created_at','desc')->get();` — no eager loading.
- `resources/views/portfolio/index.blade.php:426`: `{{ $project->category->name ?? 'Project' }}` inside the projects loop → lazy-loads `category` per project (N+1).
- Note the admin list (`ProjectController::index:14`) correctly uses `with('category')`, but the public homepage does not.
- **Fix:** `Project::with('category')->orderBy(...)->get();`

**M2. No caching of portfolio queries**
- Only `Setting::allSettings()` is cached (`app/Models/Setting.php:34` `Cache::rememberForever`). `projects`, `categories`, `skills`, `testimonials` are all re-queried from the DB on every homepage hit (`PortfolioController::index:16-20`). Under load this is the primary bottleneck.
- **Fix:** Wrap these collections in `Cache::remember('portfolio.home', 600, fn() => [...])`; clear on admin create/update/delete.

**M3. No queue worker running**
- `config/queue.php` default `database`; `render.yaml` sets `QUEUE_CONNECTION=database`. But neither `render.yaml` nor `entrypoint.sh` starts a `php artisan queue:work` process. No jobs are dispatched today (contact messages save synchronously), so it's latent — but the moment email notifications are added they'll block the request. No `failed_jobs` worker either.
- **Fix:** Add a worker service in `render.yaml` when async work is introduced.

**M4. Missing DB indexes**
- `contact_messages` migration: no index on `is_read` (queried by `scopeUnread`) or `created_at` (`latest()`).
- `projects`: no index on `category_id`, `is_featured`, `sort_order`.
- `skills`: no index on `category` (filtered/grouped by).
- `testimonials`: no index on `is_active` (scopeActive).
- Will degrade as data grows. (Users/sessions tables are correctly indexed.)

**M5. Session hardening**
- `.env.example`: `SESSION_ENCRYPT=false`, `SESSION_SECURE_COOKIE` unset, `SESSION_SAME_SITE` unset (defaults to `lax` via `config/session.php:139`).
- `bootstrap/app.php:17` `trustProxies(at: '*')` trusts all proxies (necessary on Render but broad).
- **Fix:** Set `SESSION_SECURE_COOKIE=true` and `SESSION_ENCRYPT=true` in production env.

**M6. `is_admin` is mass-assignable**
- `app/Models/User.php:23` `$fillable` includes `'is_admin'`. No controller currently mass-assigns user input to `User`, so not exploitable today — but it's a latent risk if any `User::create($request->all())` is ever added.
- **Fix:** Remove `is_admin` from `$fillable`; set it only via explicit assignment.

---

## 🟢 LOW

**L1. No lazy-loading on images** — `portfolio/index.blade.php:401` (project img), `:468` (testimonial avatar) lack `loading="lazy"`; all load eagerly on the homepage, hurting LCP/perceived performance under load.

**L2. PHP upload size mismatch** — `docker/nginx.conf` sets `client_max_body_size 20M`, but the Dockerfile never sets `upload_max_filesize`/`post_max_size` in `php.ini` (PHP default 2M). The validation rules (`max:2048` KB image, `max:5120` KB CV) assume PHP accepts ~5MB; uploads above 2MB may fail before validation runs.

**L3. `migrate --force` on every boot** — `entrypoint.sh` runs `php artisan migrate --force` at startup. Safe on Render's single free instance but risky if scaled to multiple instances (concurrent migration races). Prefer a release-phase command.

**L4. Unbounded message length** — `ContactController::store` validates `message => ['required','string','min:10']` with no `max:`. A malicious payload could store arbitrarily large rows (DB bloat/DoS). Add `max:5000`.

**L5. XSS surface is clean (good news)** — Searched all blade for `{!!`, `v-html`, `innerHTML`: **zero matches**. All output uses `{{ }}` (auto-escaped). CSRF is on by default for web routes and the contact POST is covered. Mass assignment is protected via `$fillable` on every model.

---

## What breaks under load (scalability summary)
1. **Homepage DB pressure** — uncached projects/categories/skills/testimonials + N+1 on `category` (`PortfolioController.php:17` + `index.blade.php:426`). First thing to break.
2. **Single free-tier instance** — `render.yaml` `plan: free`, single web service, no worker, no Redis. Cache/session/queue all share the same Postgres (`database` driver) → DB becomes the bottleneck for cache + sessions + jobs simultaneously.
3. **No Redis/Memcached** — `CACHE_STORE=database`, `SESSION_DRIVER=database`, `QUEUE_CONNECTION=database`. All three compete for DB connections; Redis would offload all of them. (Redis config exists in `config/database.php`/`cache.php` but is unused.)
4. **Ephemeral local filesystem** — uploads lost on redeploy; not horizontally scalable.
5. **No rate limiting** — a burst of `/contact` or `/admin/login` requests can saturate the DB and exhaust the free-tier connection limit.

## Files reviewed (evidence base)
Controllers: all 11 in `app/Http/Controllers/`. Routes: `routes/web.php`, `routes/console.php`. Middleware: `app/Http/Middleware/IsAdmin.php`, `bootstrap/app.php`. Models: all 7 in `app/Models/`. Config: `app.php`, `auth.php`, `cache.php`, `database.php`, `filesystems.php`, `queue.php`, `session.php`. Migrations: all 10. Deploy: `Dockerfile`, `render.yaml`, `docker/entrypoint.sh`, `docker/nginx.conf`, `vite.config.js`. Seed: `database/seeders/DatabaseSeeder.php`. Views: XSS-pattern scan of all 20 blade files + targeted read of `portfolio/index.blade.php`.

## Gaps / not fully verified
- I did not read every blade template line-by-line (only ran XSS-pattern scans + targeted reads of `portfolio/index.blade.php`). Business-logic display issues in admin views were not exhaustively checked, but no `{!!}`/`v-html` exists anywhere, so stored-XSS risk is low.
- `composer.json`/`package.json` dependency versions were not audited for known CVEs (out of scope for a static read; recommend `composer audit` / `npm audit`).
- No tests were executed (read-only mode).
args.next_steps: Priority remediation order: (1) Remove the admin-promotion line in `docker/entrypoint.sh` and replace seeded `password` in `database/seeders/DatabaseSeeder.php` with an env-driven credential. (2) Add `throttle` middleware to `/admin/login` and `/contact` in `routes/web.php`. (3) Add a security-headers middleware and register it in `bootstrap/app.php`. Result:
# Security & Scalability Audit — Laravel Portfolio (`C:\Users\hp\Desktop\portt`)

I read every controller, route, middleware, model, migration, config file, the Dockerfile, `render.yaml`, `entrypoint.sh`, `nginx.conf`, the seeder, and searched all blade templates for XSS patterns. Findings below with exact paths/line numbers and severity.

---

## 🔴 CRITICAL

**C1. Every user is force-promoted to admin on each deploy**
- `docker/entrypoint.sh` (near end):
  `php artisan tinker --execute='App\Models\User::where("is_admin", false)->orWhereNull("is_admin")->update(["is_admin" => true]);' 2>/dev/null || true`
- This runs on every container start. ANY registered user becomes `is_admin = true`, bypassing `IsAdmin` middleware entirely. Combined with the seeded admin below, this is a full privilege-escalation backdoor.
- **Fix:** Remove this line entirely. Manage admin status deliberately.

**C2. Hardcoded default admin credentials in production seeder**
- `database/seeders/DatabaseSeeder.php:17-23`: `email => 'admin@abideen.dev'`, `password => bcrypt('password')`.
- `entrypoint.sh` runs `php artisan db:seed --force` whenever `User::count() == 0`. On a fresh/wiped DB the app boots with a publicly-guessable admin login (`password`).
- **Fix:** Seed via env vars (`password' => bcrypt(env('ADMIN_PASSWORD'))`) with a strong random default, or disable seeding in production.

**C3. Weak/default secrets in `.env.example`**
- `.env.example`: `APP_KEY=` (empty), `APP_DEBUG=true`, `DB_PASSWORD=` (empty), `DB_USERNAME=root`, `DB_DATABASE=portt_dr`.
- `config/app.php:65` `'key' => env('APP_KEY')` with no fallback. If deployed without a key, the entrypoint auto-generates one **on every boot** (when no `.env` exists) — invalidating all sessions/encrypted data each deploy.
- `render.yaml` does set `APP_DEBUG=false` and `APP_KEY: sync:false` (good), but the `.env.example` template encourages insecure defaults.
- **Fix:** Set `APP_DEBUG=false` default, document mandatory `APP_KEY`, never commit real keys.

---

## 🟠 HIGH

**H1. No rate limiting on any route (brute-force / spam)**
- Searched all of `routes/web.php` and the whole repo for `throttle|RateLimiter` — zero matches (only an unrelated comment in `config/auth.php:89`).
- `routes/web.php:21` `Route::post('/admin/login', ...)` — login is brute-forceable.
- `routes/web.php:19` `Route::post('/contact', ...)` — contact form is spam/abuse-abuseable; `ContactController::store` (`app/Http/Controllers/ContactController.php:13`) writes straight to DB with no throttle and no captcha.
- **Fix:** Add `->middleware('throttle:5,1')` to login and `throttle:10,1'` to contact; consider `throttle:60,1` on the global web group.

**H2. Missing security headers**
- `bootstrap/app.php:16-24` registers only `trustProxies(at: '*')` and the `admin` alias. No headers middleware. No `config/cors.php` exists. No package (e.g. `kitloong/laravel-security-headers`) installed.
- Missing: `X-Frame-Options`, `X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff`, `Content-Security-Policy`, `Strict-Transport-Security`, `Referrer-Policy`, `Permissions-Policy`.
- **Fix:** Add a middleware that sets these headers; register via `$middleware->append(...)` or in a global group.

**H3. Dockerfile runs as root / no user isolation**
- `Dockerfile`: no `USER` directive. `php-fpm` and `nginx` start as root (`entrypoint.sh` → `php-fpm -D` + `nginx -g 'daemon off;'`). `chown -R www-data` is set but processes still launch as root. Exposes port 80 directly inside the container (TLS terminated by Render proxy — acceptable, but root process is not).
- **Fix:** Add a non-root `USER` after permissions setup, or run nginx/php-fpm as `www-data`. Consider a multi-stage build; don't ship `nodejs`/`npm` in the runtime image (currently installed for build only but remain in the final image — larger attack surface).

**H4. Broken `category_id` type + no foreign key**
- `database/migrations/2026_07_09_214802_create_projects_table.php:16`: `$table->string('category_id');` — should be `$table->foreignId('category_id')->constrained()->cascadeOnDelete();`.
- `app/Models/Project.php` declares `belongsTo(Category::class)` and `ProjectController` validates `exists:categories,id`, but the column is a `string` and the seeder passes integer IDs. No DB-level FK → orphaned projects possible, and `JOIN`/indexing is suboptimal on a string column.
- **Fix:** Migration to convert `category_id` to `unsignedBigInteger` + foreign key.

**H5. Ephemeral local storage for user uploads (data loss / multi-instance breakage)**
- `render.yaml` sets `FILESYSTEM_DISK: local`; `config/filesystems.php` `public` disk → `storage_path('app/public')`. All uploads (`SettingController` avatar/CV, `ProjectController`/`TestimonialController` images) via `->store(..., 'public')` land on the container's ephemeral disk.
- On Render free tier, disk is wiped on every redeploy → uploaded avatars, CV, project images, testimonial avatars disappear. Also not shared across instances.
- Additionally, **old files are never deleted** on update (e.g. `SettingController::update` lines ~88-93, `ProjectController` ~46, `TestimonialController` ~28) → orphaned files accumulate.
- **Fix:** Use S3 disk (`AWS_*` vars exist in `.env.example`); delete previous file on replacement.

---

## 🟡 MEDIUM

**M1. N+1 query on the homepage**
- `app/Http/Controllers/PortfolioController.php:17`: `Project::orderBy('sort_order')->orderBy('created_at','desc')->get();` — no eager loading.
- `resources/views/portfolio/index.blade.php:426`: `{{ $project->category->name ?? 'Project' }}` inside the projects loop → lazy-loads `category` per project (N+1).
- Note the admin list (`ProjectController::index:14`) correctly uses `with('category')`, but the public homepage does not.
- **Fix:** `Project::with('category')->orderBy(...)->get();`

**M2. No caching of portfolio queries**
- Only `Setting::allSettings()` is cached (`app/Models/Setting.php:34` `Cache::rememberForever`). `projects`, `categories`, `skills`, `testimonials` are all re-queried from the DB on every homepage hit (`PortfolioController::index:16-20`). Under load this is the primary bottleneck.
- **Fix:** Wrap these collections in `Cache::remember('portfolio.home', 600, fn() => [...])`; clear on admin create/update/delete.

**M3. No queue worker running**
- `config/queue.php` default `database`; `render.yaml` sets `QUEUE_CONNECTION=database`. But neither `render.yaml` nor `entrypoint.sh` starts a `php artisan queue:work` process. No jobs are dispatched today (contact messages save synchronously), so it's latent — but the moment email notifications are added they'll block the request. No `failed_jobs` worker either.
- **Fix:** Add a worker service in `render.yaml` when async work is introduced.

**M4. Missing DB indexes**
- `contact_messages` migration: no index on `is_read` (queried by `scopeUnread`) or `created_at` (`latest()`).
- `projects`: no index on `category_id`, `is_featured`, `sort_order`.
- `skills`: no index on `category` (filtered/grouped by).
- `testimonials`: no index on `is_active` (scopeActive).
- Will degrade as data grows. (Users/sessions tables are correctly indexed.)

**M5. Session hardening**
- `.env.example`: `SESSION_ENCRYPT=false`, `SESSION_SECURE_COOKIE` unset, `SESSION_SAME_SITE` unset (defaults to `lax` via `config/session.php:139`).
- `bootstrap/app.php:17` `trustProxies(at: '*')` trusts all proxies (necessary on Render but broad).
- **Fix:** Set `SESSION_SECURE_COOKIE=true` and `SESSION_ENCRYPT=true` in production env.

**M6. `is_admin` is mass-assignable**
- `app/Models/User.php:23` `$fillable` includes `'is_admin'`. No controller currently mass-assigns user input to `User`, so not exploitable today — but it's a latent risk if any `User::create($request->all())` is ever added.
- **Fix:** Remove `is_admin` from `$fillable`; set it only via explicit assignment.

---

## 🟢 LOW

**L1. No lazy-loading on images** — `portfolio/index.blade.php:401` (project img), `:468` (testimonial avatar) lack `loading="lazy"`; all load eagerly on the homepage, hurting LCP/perceived performance under load.

**L2. PHP upload size mismatch** — `docker/nginx.conf` sets `client_max_body_size 20M`, but the Dockerfile never sets `upload_max_filesize`/`post_max_size` in `php.ini` (PHP default 2M). The validation rules (`max:2048` KB image, `max:5120` KB CV) assume PHP accepts ~5MB; uploads above 2MB may fail before validation runs.

**L3. `migrate --force` on every boot** — `entrypoint.sh` runs `php artisan migrate --force` at startup. Safe on Render's single free instance but risky if scaled to multiple instances (concurrent migration races). Prefer a release-phase command.

**L4. Unbounded message length** — `ContactController::store` validates `message => ['required','string','min:10']` with no `max:`. A malicious payload could store arbitrarily large rows (DB bloat/DoS). Add `max:5000`.

**L5. XSS surface is clean (good news)** — Searched all blade for `{!!`, `v-html`, `innerHTML`: **zero matches**. All output uses `{{ }}` (auto-escaped). CSRF is on by default for web routes and the contact POST is covered. Mass assignment is protected via `$fillable` on every model.

---

## What breaks under load (scalability summary)
1. **Homepage DB pressure** — uncached projects/categories/skills/testimonials + N+1 on `category` (`PortfolioController.php:17` + `index.blade.php:426`). First thing to break.
2. **Single free-tier instance** — `render.yaml` `plan: free`, single web service, no worker, no Redis. Cache/session/queue all share the same Postgres (`database` driver) → DB becomes the bottleneck for cache + sessions + jobs simultaneously.
3. **No Redis/Memcached** — `CACHE_STORE=database`, `SESSION_DRIVER=database`, `QUEUE_CONNECTION=database`. All three compete for DB connections; Redis would offload all of them. (Redis config exists in `config/database.php`/`cache.php` but is unused.)
4. **Ephemeral local filesystem** — uploads lost on redeploy; not horizontally scalable.
5. **No rate limiting** — a burst of `/contact` or `/admin/login` requests can saturate the DB and exhaust the free-tier connection limit.

## Files reviewed (evidence base)
Controllers: all 11 in `app/Http/Controllers/`. Routes: `routes/web.php`, `routes/console.php`. Middleware: `app/Http/Middleware/IsAdmin.php`, `bootstrap/app.php`. Models: all 7 in `app/Models/`. Config: `app.php`, `auth.php`, `cache.php`, `database.php`, `filesystems.php`, `queue.php`, `session.php`. Migrations: all 10. Deploy: `Dockerfile`, `render.yaml`, `docker/entrypoint.sh`, `docker/nginx.conf`, `vite.config.js`. Seed: `database/seeders/DatabaseSeeder.php`. Views: XSS-pattern scan of all 20 blade files + targeted read of `portfolio/index.blade.php`.

## Gaps / not fully verified
- I did not read every blade template line-by-line (only ran XSS-pattern scans + targeted reads of `portfolio/index.blade.php`). Business-logic display issues in admin views were not exhaustively checked, but no `{!!}`/`v-html` exists anywhere, so stored-XSS risk is low.
- `composer.json`/`package.json` dependency versions were not audited for known CVEs (out of scope for a static read; recommend `composer audit` / `npm audit`).
- No tests were executed (read-only mode).

Next steps:
Priority remediation order: (1) Remove the admin-promotion line in `docker/entrypoint.sh` and replace seeded `password` in `database/seeders/DatabaseSeeder.php` with an env-driven credential. (2) Add `throttle` middleware to `/admin/login` and `/contact` in `routes/web.php`. (3) Add a security-headers middleware and register it in `bootstrap/app.php`. (4) Fix the `projects.category_id` migration to a real foreign key. (5) Eager-load `category` in `PortfolioController::index` and cache the homepage collections. (6) Switch `FILESYSTEM_DISK` to S3 in `render.yaml` and delete replaced upload files on update. (7) Set `SESSION_SECURE_COOKIE=true`/`SESSION_ENCRYPT=true` and add DB indexes. (8) Add `loading="lazy"` to portfolio images and align PHP `upload_max_filesize` with nginx `client_max_body_size`. Run `composer audit` and `npm audit` for dependency CVEs.

Task MUST complete:
I need a very thorough security and scalability audit of this Laravel portfolio project at C:\Users\hp\Desktop\portt.

Check ALL of the following:

**SECURITY:**
1. Read `app/Http/Controllers/` — look at every controller, especially form submission, file uploads, contact form, calculator
2. Read `routes/web.php` and any API routes
3. Read `app/Http/Middleware/` — all middleware, especially auth, CSRF, rate limiting
4. Read `config/` files — look at session config, CORS, auth, sanctum, etc.
5. Read `.env.example` — check for exposed secrets, default credentials
6. Read `app/Models/` — check for mass assignment protection ($fillable/$guarded)
7. Check for SQL injection, XSS vulnerabilities in blade templates (look for `{!! !!}` usage)
8. Check for input validation (Form Requests or inline validate())
9. Check file upload handling (path traversal, file type validation, storage)
10. Check security headers (X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, CSP, etc.)
11. Check the Dockerfile for security issues (running as root, exposed ports, etc.)

**SCALABILITY:**
1. Check database query patterns — look for N+1 queries, missing eager loading
2. Check caching strategy — is Redis/Memcached used? Are queries cached?
3. Check session driver configuration
4. Check queue/job processing
5. Check the render.yaml / deployment config
6. Check if there's any rate limiting on routes
7. Check asset loading (Vite config, lazy loading images)
8. Check database indexes (read migrations)

Report back with:
- Exact file paths and line numbers for every issue found
- Severity rating for each issue (Critical/High/Medium/Low)
- What the issue is and how to fix it
- For scalability: what would break under load and why

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use App\Models\Setting;
use App\Models\Project;
use App\Models\Skill;
use App\Models\Testimonial;
use App\Models\Category;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;

class PortfolioController extends Controller
{
    public function index()
    {
        $settings = Setting::allSettings();

        $projects = Project::orderBy('sort_order')->orderBy('created_at', 'desc')->get();
        $categories = Category::orderBy('sort_order')->get();
        $skills = Skill::orderBy('sort_order')->get()->groupBy('category');
        $testimonials = Testimonial::active()->get();

        $typingWords = json_decode($settings['typing_words'] ?? '["Full-Stack Developer"]', true);

        $calcSettings = [
            'base_landing' => $settings['calc_base_landing'] ?? 50000,
            'base_business' => $settings['calc_base_business'] ?? 80000,
            'base_school' => $settings['calc_base_school'] ?? 150000,
            'base_ecommerce' => $settings['calc_base_ecommerce'] ?? 200000,
            'base_webapp' => $settings['calc_base_webapp'] ?? 300000,
            'per_page' => $settings['calc_per_page'] ?? 10000,
            'included_pages' => $settings['calc_included_pages'] ?? 5,
            'feat_seo' => $settings['calc_feat_seo'] ?? 20000,
            'feat_payment' => $settings['calc_feat_payment'] ?? 30000,
            'feat_auth' => $settings['calc_feat_auth'] ?? 25000,
            'feat_dashboard' => $settings['calc_feat_dashboard'] ?? 40000,
            'feat_api' => $settings['calc_feat_api'] ?? 35000,
            'feat_chat' => $settings['calc_feat_chat'] ?? 15000,
            'feat_cms' => $settings['calc_feat_cms'] ?? 35000,
            'feat_email' => $settings['calc_feat_email'] ?? 15000,
        ];

        return view('portfolio.index', compact(
            'settings',
            'projects',
            'categories',
            'skills',
            'testimonials',
            'typingWords',
            'calcSettings'
        ));
    }

    public function downloadCV()
    {
        $cvPath = Setting::get('cv_path');

        if ($cvPath && file_exists(storage_path('app/public/' . $cvPath))) {
            return response()->download(storage_path('app/public/' . $cvPath));
        }

        return back()->with('error', 'CV not available. Please upload it from the admin dashboard.');
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use App\Models\Setting;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;

class SettingController extends Controller
{
    public function edit()
    {
        $settings = Setting::allSettings();
        return view('admin.settings.edit', compact('settings'));
    }

    public function update(Request $request)
    {
        $validated = $request->validate([
            'site_name' => ['required', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'hero_title' => ['required', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'hero_subtitle' => ['required', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'typing_words' => ['required', 'string'],
            'about_bio' => ['required', 'string'],
            'current_role' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'location' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'email' => ['required', 'email'],
            'phone' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'whatsapp' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'github_url' => ['nullable', 'url'],
            'linkedin_url' => ['nullable', 'url'],
            'hero_avatar' => ['nullable', 'image', 'max:2048'],
            'cv_path' => ['nullable', 'file', 'max:5120', 'mimes:pdf,doc,docx'],
            'stat_projects' => ['nullable', 'integer'],
            'stat_clients' => ['nullable', 'integer'],
            'stat_experience' => ['nullable', 'integer'],
            'stat_technologies' => ['nullable', 'integer'],
            'calc_base_landing' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:0'],
            'calc_base_business' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:0'],
            'calc_base_school' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:0'],
            'calc_base_ecommerce' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:0'],
            'calc_base_webapp' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:0'],
            'calc_per_page' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:0'],
            'calc_included_pages' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:0'],
            'calc_feat_seo' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:0'],
            'calc_feat_payment' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:0'],
            'calc_feat_auth' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:0'],
            'calc_feat_dashboard' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:0'],
            'calc_feat_api' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:0'],
            'calc_feat_chat' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:0'],
            'calc_feat_cms' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:0'],
            'calc_feat_email' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:0'],
        ]);

        // Process typing words into JSON
        $words = array_filter(array_map('trim', explode(',', $validated['typing_words'])));
        Setting::set('typing_words', json_encode($words));

        // Save text settings
        $textKeys = [
            'site_name', 'hero_title', 'hero_subtitle', 'about_bio',
            'current_role', 'location', 'email', 'phone', 'whatsapp',
            'github_url', 'linkedin_url',
            'stat_projects', 'stat_clients', 'stat_experience', 'stat_technologies',
            'calc_base_landing', 'calc_base_business', 'calc_base_school',
            'calc_base_ecommerce', 'calc_base_webapp',
            'calc_per_page', 'calc_included_pages',
            'calc_feat_seo', 'calc_feat_payment', 'calc_feat_auth',
            'calc_feat_dashboard', 'calc_feat_api', 'calc_feat_chat',
            'calc_feat_cms', 'calc_feat_email',
        ];

        foreach ($textKeys as $key) {
            Setting::set($key, $validated[$key] ?? null);
        }

        // Handle avatar upload
        if ($request->hasFile('hero_avatar')) {
            Setting::set('hero_avatar', $request->file('hero_avatar')->store('avatars', 'public'));
        }

        // Handle CV upload
        if ($request->hasFile('cv_path')) {
            Setting::set('cv_path', $request->file('cv_path')->store('cv', 'public'));
        }

        return redirect()->route('admin.settings.edit')->with('success', 'Settings updated successfully.');
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Auth;

class AdminAuthController extends Controller
{
    public function showLogin()
    {
        if (Auth::check()) {
            return redirect()->route('admin.dashboard');
        }

        return view('admin.login');
    }

    public function login(Request $request)
    {
        $credentials = $request->validate([
            'email' => ['required', 'email'],
            'password' => ['required'],
        ]);

        if (Auth::attempt($credentials, $request->boolean('remember'))) {
            if (! Auth::user()->is_admin) {
                Auth::logout();
                $request->session()->invalidate();
                $request->session()->regenerateToken();
                return back()->withErrors([
                    'email' => 'You do not have admin access.',
                ])->onlyInput('email');
            }

            $request->session()->regenerate();
            return redirect()->intended(route('admin.dashboard'));
        }

        return back()->withErrors([
            'email' => 'The provided credentials do not match our records.',
        ])->onlyInput('email');
    }

    public function logout(Request $request)
    {
        Auth::logout();
        $request->session()->invalidate();
        $request->session()->regenerateToken();
        return redirect()->route('admin.login');
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use App\Models\Project;
use App\Models\Category;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Str;

class ProjectController extends Controller
{
    public function index()
    {
        $projects = Project::with('category')->orderBy('sort_order')->latest()->paginate(10);
        return view('admin.projects.index', compact('projects'));
    }

    public function create()
    {
        $categories = Category::orderBy('name')->get();
        return view('admin.projects.create', compact('categories'));
    }

    public function store(Request $request)
    {
        if ($request->input('project_url') === '#') {
            $request->merge(['project_url' => null]);
        }

        $validated = $request->validate([
            'title' => ['required', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'category_id' => ['required', 'exists:categories,id'],
            'description' => ['required', 'string'],
            'image_path' => ['nullable', 'image', 'max:2048'],
            'project_url' => ['nullable', 'url'],
            'is_featured' => ['boolean'],
            'sort_order' => ['nullable', 'integer'],
        ]);

        if ($request->hasFile('image_path')) {
            $validated['image_path'] = $request->file('image_path')->store('projects', 'public');
        }

        $validated['slug'] = Str::slug($validated['title']);
        $validated['is_featured'] = $request->boolean('is_featured');
        $validated['sort_order'] = $validated['sort_order'] ?? 0;

        Project::create($validated);

        return redirect()->route('admin.projects.index')->with('success', 'Project created successfully.');
    }

    public function edit(Project $project)
    {
        $categories = Category::orderBy('name')->get();
        return view('admin.projects.edit', compact('project', 'categories'));
    }

    public function update(Request $request, Project $project)
    {
        if ($request->input('project_url') === '#') {
            $request->merge(['project_url' => null]);
        }

        $validated = $request->validate([
            'title' => ['required', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'category_id' => ['required', 'exists:categories,id'],
            'description' => ['required', 'string'],
            'image_path' => ['nullable', 'image', 'max:2048'],
            'project_url' => ['nullable', 'url'],
            'is_featured' => ['boolean'],
            'sort_order' => ['nullable', 'integer'],
        ]);

        if ($request->hasFile('image_path')) {
            $validated['image_path'] = $request->file('image_path')->store('projects', 'public');
        }

        $validated['slug'] = Str::slug($validated['title']);
        $validated['is_featured'] = $request->boolean('is_featured');
        $validated['sort_order'] = $validated['sort_order'] ?? 0;

        $project->update($validated);

        return redirect()->route('admin.projects.index')->with('success', 'Project updated successfully.');
    }

    public function destroy(Project $project)
    {
        $project->delete();
        return redirect()->route('admin.projects.index')->with('success', 'Project deleted successfully.');
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use App\Models\ContactMessage;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;

class ContactMessageController extends Controller
{
    public function index(Request $request)
    {
        $query = ContactMessage::latest();

        if ($request->has('filter') && $request->filter === 'unread') {
            $query->unread();
        }

        $messages = $query->paginate(10);
        return view('admin.messages.index', compact('messages'));
    }

    public function show(ContactMessage $message)
    {
        if (!$message->is_read) {
            $message->update(['is_read' => true]);
        }

        return view('admin.messages.show', compact('message'));
    }

    public function markRead(ContactMessage $message)
    {
        $message->update(['is_read' => true]);
        return back()->with('success', 'Message marked as read.');
    }

    public function destroy(ContactMessage $message)
    {
        $message->delete();
        return redirect()->route('admin.messages.index')->with('success', 'Message deleted successfully.');
    }
}

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

        return view('admin.testimonials.edit', compact('testimonial'));
    }

    public function update(Request $request, Testimonial $testimonial)
    {
        $validated = $request->validate([
            'author_name' => ['required', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'author_role' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'author_company' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'content' => ['required', 'string'],
            'avatar_path' => ['nullable', 'image', 'max:2048'],
            'rating' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:1', 'max:5'],
            'is_active' => ['boolean'],
            'sort_order' => ['nullable', 'integer'],
        ]);

        if ($request->hasFile('avatar_path')) {
            $validated['avatar_path'] = $request->file('avatar_path')->store('avatars', 'public');
        }

        $validated['is_active'] = $request->boolean('is_active');
        $validated['sort_order'] = $validated['sort_order'] ?? 0;

        $testimonial->update($validated);

        return redirect()->route('admin.testimonials.index')->with('success', 'Testimonial updated successfully.');
    }

    public function destroy(Testimonial $testimonial)
    {
        $testimonial->delete();
        return redirect()->route('admin.testimonials.index')->with('success', 'Testimonial deleted successfully.');
    }
}

<?php

use App\Http\Controllers\AdminAuthController;
use App\Http\Controllers\ContactController;
use App\Http\Controllers\PortfolioController;
use App\Http\Controllers\DashboardController;
use App\Http\Controllers\ProjectController;
use App\Http\Controllers\CategoryController;
use App\Http\Controllers\SkillController;
use App\Http\Controllers\TestimonialController;
use App\Http\Controllers\SettingController;
use App\Http\Controllers\ContactMessageController;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Route;

// Public routes
Route::get('/', [PortfolioController::class, 'index'])->name('home');
Route::post('/contact', [ContactController::class, 'store'])->name('contact.store');
Route::get('/download-cv', [PortfolioController::class, 'downloadCV'])->name('download.cv');

// Admin auth (guest only)
Route::get('/admin/login', [AdminAuthController::class, 'showLogin'])->name('admin.login');
Route::post('/admin/login', [AdminAuthController::class, 'login']);

// Protected admin routes
Route::middleware(['auth', 'admin'])->prefix('admin')->name('admin.')->group(function () {
    Route::post('logout', [AdminAuthController::class, 'logout'])->name('logout');
    Route::get('/', [DashboardController::class, 'index'])->name('dashboard');

    Route::resource('projects', ProjectController::class)->except('show');

});

<?php

namespace App\Http\Middleware;

use Closure;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;

class IsAdmin
{
    /**
     * Handle an incoming request.
     *
     * @param  Closure(Request): (Response)  $next
     */
    public function handle(Request $request, Closure $next): Response
    {
        if (! $request->user() || ! $request->user()->is_admin) {
            abort(403, 'Unauthorized access to admin panel.');
        }

        return $next($request);
    }
}

class User extends Authenticatable
{
    /** @use HasFactory<UserFactory> */
    use HasFactory, Notifiable;

    /**

     *

     */
    protected $fillable = [
        'name',
        'email',
        'password',

    ];

    /**

     *

     */
    protected $hidden = [
        'password',
        'remember_token',
    ];

    /**
     * Get the attributes that should be cast.
     *
     * @return array<string, string>
     */
    protected function casts(): array
    {
        return [
            'email_verified_at' => 'datetime',

        ];
    }
}

        });

    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Support\Str;

class Project extends Model
{
    protected $fillable = [
        'title',
        'slug',
        'category_id',
        'description',
        'image_path',
        'gallery',
        'project_url',
        'is_featured',
        'sort_order',
    ];

    protected $casts = [
        'gallery' => 'array',
        'is_featured' => 'boolean',
    ];

    protected static function boot(): void
    {
        parent::boot();

        static::creating(function ($project) {
            if (empty($project->slug)) {
                $project->slug = Str::slug($project->title);
            }
        });
    }

    public function category()
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(Category::class);
    }

    public function scopeFeatured($query)
    {
        return $query->where('is_featured', true);
    }

    public function getThumbnailUrlAttribute()
    {
        return $this->image_path
            ? asset('storage/' . $this->image_path)
            : asset('images/project-placeholder.svg');
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Cache;

class Setting extends Model
{
    protected $fillable = ['key', 'value'];

    protected static function boot(): void
    {
        parent::boot();

        static::saved(function () {
            Cache::forget('app_settings');
        });

        static::deleted(function () {
            Cache::forget('app_settings');
        });
    }

    public static function get(string $key, $default = null)
    {
        $settings = self::all();

        $setting = $settings->firstWhere('key', $key);

        return $setting?->value ?? $default;
    }

    public static function set(string $key, $value): void
    {
        self::updateOrCreate(
            ['key' => $key],
            ['value' => $value]
        );
    }

    public static function allSettings(): array
    {
        return Cache::rememberForever('app_settings', function () {
            return self::pluck('value', 'key')->toArray();
        });
    }
}

FROM php:8.2-fpm-alpine

# Install system deps, PHP extensions, and cleanup build deps in one layer
RUN apk add --no-cache \
    nginx \
    postgresql-dev \
    libpng-dev \
    libzip-dev \
    oniguruma-dev \
    zip \
    unzip \
    nodejs \
    npm \
    && docker-php-ext-install pdo_pgsql mbstring exif pcntl bcmath gd zip

# Get Composer
COPY --from=composer:latest /usr/bin/composer /usr/bin/composer

WORKDIR /var/www/html

# Install PHP deps
COPY composer.json composer.lock ./
RUN composer install --no-dev --optimize-autoloader --no-interaction --no-scripts

# Install Node deps and build assets in one layer
COPY package.json package-lock.json ./
COPY . .
RUN npm ci && npm run build && npm prune --production

# Run artisan discovery now that source is copied
RUN composer dump-autoload --optimize && php artisan package:discover --ansi

# Set permissions
RUN chown -R www-data:www-data /var/www/html && chmod -R 775 storage bootstrap/cache

# Configure nginx and entrypoint
COPY docker/nginx.conf /etc/nginx/http.d/default.conf
COPY docker/entrypoint.sh /usr/local/bin/entrypoint.sh
RUN chmod +x /usr/local/bin/entrypoint.sh

EXPOSE 80

ENTRYPOINT ["/usr/local/bin/entrypoint.sh"]
